Cookie Policy

Valid as of: 07/18/2026

Introduction

Please read this Cookie Policy (“Policy”) carefully as it describes how Movez Ventures (“we”, “us”, or “our”) use cookies on this website. This Policy should be read in conjunction with our Privacy Policy.

Our use of cookies

A “cookie” is a small text file stored on your browser or device by websites you visit. As of the date above, this website does not set analytics, advertising, or other non-essential cookies, and we do not load Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, or similar tracking scripts.

Your browser or hosting provider may still use strictly technical mechanisms needed to deliver the page (for example, standard HTTPS and caching behavior). Those are not used by us to identify you or measure marketing performance.

If we introduce cookies or similar technologies in the future, we will update this Policy and, where required, ask for your consent before setting non-essential cookies.

Managing cookies in your browser

You can usually set your browser to remove or reject cookies. For general guidance, see aboutcookies.org.

Changes to the Policy

We may change this Policy from time to time. When we make significant changes, when reasonable, we will take steps to inform you, for example by including a prominent link to a description of those changes on our website for a reasonable period or by other means, such as email.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about our use of cookies or your personal information, please review our Privacy Policy or contact us directly: info@movez.vc

Copyright © Movez Ventures 2026

Privacy Policy · Cookie Policy
